title: Terracotta Diya Set (Pack of 12)
shortDescription: Hand-shaped clay diyas, kiln-fired for an even glow.
description: A set of 12 hand-shaped terracotta diyas, fired in small-batch kilns by potters in rural West Bengal. Each piece is slightly different, which is the point. Use them for Diwali, Kali Puja, or everyday tabletop light. Unglazed clay finish; wipe clean, do not soak.
